name: Ayesha bundle backend waterfall (7 stages)
what_it_solves: Composes an end-to-end therapy-fit bundle for the front-end by chaining safety, efficacy, IO, trials, SOC, biomarker services.
how_it_solves: Sequential waterfall: each stage reads the accumulated bundle, gates on prior outputs (e.g. PGx safety before IO recommendation), and appends its own typed subsection.
why_it_exists: Removes duplicated cross-service logic from Layer 4 routes and centralises the ordering rules (safety-before-efficacy, mechanism-before-trial-match) that CRISPRO_HARDENING_AUDIT flagged as leaky in v2.
